topic: Neurogenesis: how new brain cells are born daily
caption: Did you know your brain grows 700 new neurons daily? 🧠💡 Learn how neurogenesis works and boost your brain health. Neurogenesis is the process by which new neurons are formed in the brain. 💻 It's a complex process involving multiple stages, from proliferation to migration and differentiation. 🔄 Research shows that exercise, meditation, and sleep can stimulate neurogenesis. 🏋️‍♀️🙏🛋️ Save this so you don't lose it. Tag a friend who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future brain will thank you. 🙌 #neurogenesis #brainhealth #neuroscience #meditation #exercise #sleep
